text: Hey, I was wondering about something related to my order, but I can't seem to find the details right now. Can you help?

I seem to have a bit of a conundrum with my account details. I recently attempted to update my email address linked to the account, as I noticed it was displaying an old one that I no longer use. However, when I accessed the settings, the option to change the email was not only greyed out but also showed an error message that said I had to verify my new phone number before making such changes. The thing is, I thought I had already updated my phone number, but it appears that I'm still receiving verification codes on the old number. Quite frankly, I'm confused about how I can resolve this issue, as it seems contradictory to the process outlined in your help section. Can you please help me clarify what the next steps are? I would like to ensure my email is updated without further complications.
my app keeps crashing when I try to upload photos. what is going on?

I seem to be having some sort of persistent issue with my account, but I can't provide all the details at the moment. It’s like there are certain functionalities that are just not working as they should, and I’m quite confused as to why this is happening. I’m not sure if I've overlooked something in the settings, or if it’s a larger problem that needs addressing. Can you give me some guidance on what to do when you don't have all the specifics? Like, what are my options if I can't really explain what’s wrong?

I hope this message finds you well. I would like to inquire if there exists a student discount option available for your services. Additionally, if such a discount is indeed offered, could you kindly provide me with the necessary steps I must undertake to apply for it? Thank you for your assistance in this matter, and I appreciate your help despite the fact that my phone is currently malfunctioning.

I would like to express my dissatisfaction regarding your service, yet I must admit that I had quite a good experience previously. The recent interactions, however, have left much to be desired. It seems that my previous feedback was somehow overlooked, which contradicts your claims of valuing customer input. I hope for a resolution to my concerns, but I am unsure of how to proceed given the discrepancies I've encountered.

I am writing to formally request a refund for the order I placed on September 10th, which, regrettably, has not met my expectations due to several significant discrepancies. I appreciate your immediate attention to this matter, as I have already followed all necessary return procedures outlined on your website, yet I have not received confirmation or further instructions. Thank you for addressing this issue promptly, and I look forward to your swift response.
I'm really confused and just want to know how to use the app better, but I can't remember what I was struggling with. Help!
Is my order arriving tomorrow or the day after? I thought it was set for tomorrow but got a message saying it might not.

Dear Support Team, I hope this message finds you well. I am experiencing an unusual issue with my software that I cannot quite pinpoint. It seems that, despite following all the provided documentation and even after updating to the latest version, the main feature I need remains completely unresponsive. Additionally, I've noticed that my cat has taken an unusual interest in my laptop while this problem has occurred, which might not be related but I thought it worth mentioning since it’s quite the odd behavior. Can you please assist me in resolving this technical glitch? Thank you in advance for your help!
Hey, I wanna return this thing I bought. It's not what I expected.

I am having a really big problem with the software, it keeps crashing and I can't seem to figure out why! I've tried everything I could think of, like restarting the app, and even reinstalling it, but it’s just won’t run properly! it’s so frustating because I think it might be related to some updates, but I’m not really sure! Can someone help me with this? It’s been days and I didn’t make any changes on my end.

I was wondering if, perhpas, there's some sort of special conditions or limitations that might apply regarding the billing cycles for your subscription plans? It's rather confusng, and I want to ensure I fully understand what I'm signing up for, especially since I'm looking into the pro plan and I heard there might be some nuances that could affect the total cost depending on how I choose to proceed with it. So, is it monthly? Or is it yearly? Or is there maybe a possibility to combine both? Just trying to wrap my head around this.
I was told I would get a refund if I returned the item, but now I see on your site that you don’t offer refunds at all. What’s going on? I want my money back, even if it’s not your policy!
I thought the subscription was free? But now I see charges? What's up with that?
I received the wrong item but I also want to return the one I ordered. Can I get a refund for both?
